page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance designed for compute-intensive workloads. It is powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor operating at 2.9 GHz, featuring 32 dedicated physical cores with a 1:1 thread-to-core ratio. The instance is equipped with 128.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

The primary hardware accelerator configuration consists of two NVIDIA A10 GPUs, delivering a combined total of 48 GB of VRAM. This instance does not include any local NVMe or SSD storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met through network-attached block storage. Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 16 Gbps, and the instance runs on a KVM hypervisor.

From a resource density perspective, the combination of dedicated Intel Xeon cores and dual NVIDIA A10 GPUs offers a balanced hardware profile for parallel processing tasks. The lack of local storage represents a key architectural tradeoff, requiring reliance on external storage solutions which may impact sequential read and write latency. However, the dedicated CPU allocation ensures consistent performance without resource contention.
This server configuration is suited for workloads such as deep learning inference, mid-range AI model training, video transcoding, 3D rendering, and GPU-accelerated data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn7i-2x.8xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance built on the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at 2.9 GHz, paired with 128.0 GB of system memory. Acceleration is driven by two NVIDIA A10 GPUs providing a total of 48 GB of VRAM. The instance does not include local storage, relying instead on network-attached storage options, and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 16 Gbps. This hardware profile is designed for parallel computing tasks, making it suitable for deep learning inference, graphics rendering, video encoding, and high-performance computing workloads that benefit from dedicated CPU resources and dual-GPU acceleration.
